step_outcomes.1: Automation rules engine: automation_rules table, condition evaluator (5 operators, nested field access), action executor (4 action types), event bus listener with loop prevention (depth 3), built-in rules (auto-close epic, auto-advance parent). 44 tests.
step_outcomes.2: Automation rules UI: management page with condition builder, trigger/action config, active toggle, built-in badge, create/edit/delete dialogs.
step_outcomes.3: Templates: templates table, task + project template instantiation, create-from-task, pm_list_templates + pm_use_template MCP tools. 22 server + 5 MCP tests.
step_outcomes.4: Templates UI: two-tab page (task/project), create/edit/use dialogs, subtask/epic list editors, color picker for labels, save-as-template from task detail.
step_outcomes.5: JSON export/import: full project export with all entity types, import with ID remapping, backup via SQLite backup API. 12 tests.
step_outcomes.6: Production server: static file serving, SPA fallback, cross-env scripts, .env.example, comprehensive CLAUDE.md.
step_outcomes.7: E2E tests: Playwright setup, 15 tests across 4 spec files (setup/login, project workflow, task management, search). Found and fixed a createdBy bug.
